judge_scores.reasoning: The response incorrectly attributes the R$600 increase to Lula instead of Bolsonaro.
The response incorrectly attributes the R$600 increase to Lula, whereas it was initially implemented by Bolsonaro in 2022.

The response incorrectly attributes the R$600 increase to Lula in 2023, when in fact it was Bolsonaro who raised the value to R$600 via PEC 1/2022 (the 'PEC Kamikaze') in July 2022 under the Auxílio Brasil program; Lula merely maintained the value when relaunching Bolsa Família.
